\tzpentry{ID3378}{Modal Frequency Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3378 introduces Modal Frequency Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \omega_{nlm,n'l'm',m_{KK}}^2 = \omega_{nlm}^2 + \omega_{n'l'm'}^2 + \left(\frac{m_{KK}c}{R_{KK}}\right)^2 + 2\lambda_g \sqrt{\omega_{nlm}^2 \omega_{n'l'm'}^2} \delta_{ll'}\delta_{mm'} \end{equation}
